description_long: This is a low-poly adult human figure with a stylized, athletic build, standing upright with arms slightly outstretched. The figure wears a fitted long-sleeve top tucked into high-waisted pants, both of which are form-fitting and suggestive of active or casual urban attire. The head is covered with a close-fitting cap or helmet, and the face is partially obscured, giving the figure a modern, somewhat anonymous appearance. The hands and feet are simplified, with blocky shapes and minimal detail, while the overall body proportions are realistic. The back features a prominent, angular backpack or rigid structure, adding to the urban, on-the-go impression. The color palette is bold and distinct, with clear separation between the upper and lower garments and accessories.
description: A stylized adult figure in fitted urban clothing, standing upright with a prominent backpack and a covered head. The design is low-poly with bold, distinct color blocks and simplified features.
description_view_0: Front view shows the figure's face covering, fitted top, and outstretched arms, with the backpack only partially visible.
description_view_1: Left side view highlights the profile of the head covering, the angular backpack protruding from the back, and the slim fit of the clothing.
description_view_2: Rear view reveals the full structure of the backpack, the broad shoulders, and the back seam of the pants.
description_view_3: Right side view mirrors the left, showing the backpack's depth and the figure's upright posture.
attribute_clothing_type: athletic wear with a fitted long-sleeve top, high-waisted pants, and a close-fitting cap or helmet
attribute_hairstyle: hair fully covered by cap or helmet
